description: Positive interest reply with no explicit scheduling intent. Should be classified T1 (POSITIVE_INTEREST) by the mock semantic classifier (no deterministic rule matches), routed to human review with a draft using T1_SCENARIO_C_UNCLEAR_INTEREST.

input.reply_subject: Re: Quick question about your sales pipeline
input.reply_text: This sounds interesting, tell me more about how it works.
input.reply_text_snippet: This sounds interesting, tell me more about how it works.

validation_learning.voice_of_customer_excerpt: This sounds interesting, tell me more about how it works.

expected.notes: No det-* rule matches (no unsubscribe/legal/hostile/bounce/ooo/price/booking/referral/wrong-person language). Section B mock classifier matches positiveRx ('sounds interesting') -> POSITIVE_INTEREST conf 0.75 (>= 0.60, no override). interest_stage VALIDATION_SPRINT_INTEREST is never escalated to ALPHA_INTEREST. nes.lead_first_name is not populated by Workflow 1 Section D, so resolveFirstName always returns null and 'firstName' is always a missing_variable for templated drafts (see docs/ASSUMPTIONS_AND_UNKNOWNS.md D7).
